name: openguardrails-instrumentation-codex
description: OpenGuardrails (OGR) command-approval gate for OpenAI Codex — a PreToolUse hook that denies risky tool calls (curl|bash, obfuscated exec, egress, credential reads) even when Codex approvals are bypassed.

scripts.build: npm run build:guardrail && npm run build:automode
scripts.build:guardrail: esbuild hooks/ogr-codex-hook.src.mjs --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=hooks/ogr-codex-hook.mjs --banner:js="// GENERATED by 'npm run build' from hooks/ogr-codex-hook.src.mjs — do not edit by hand."
scripts.build:automode: esbuild hooks/ogr-codex-automode-hook.src.mjs --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=hooks/ogr-codex-automode-hook.mjs --banner:js="// GENERATED by 'npm run build' from hooks/ogr-codex-automode-hook.src.mjs — do not edit by hand."
